content.query:
DROP TABLE [EDW].[FACT_ACCOUNTS_RECEIVABLE]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[FACT_ACCOUNTS_RECEIVABLE]
( 
	[DocumentType] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ReferenceNumber] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[AccountCode] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CustomerID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[BranchCode] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CompanyID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CustomerOrderNumber] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[DocumentDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[ClosedDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[DueDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[PaymentDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[InvoiceDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[PostPeriod] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[TransactionPeriodID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[PaymentPeriod] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Approved] [bit]  NULL,
	[Rejected] [bit]  NULL,
	[Released] [bit]  NULL,
	[Status] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Voided] [bit]  NULL,
	[DocumentBalance] [decimal](38,18)  NULL,
	[OriginalDocumentAmount] [decimal](38,18)  NULL,
	[PaymentMethod] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[DocumentDescription] [nvarchar](1000)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	HEAP
)
GO
